data.title: Richards Building Supply expands CRM to speed digital estimating and ordering
data.description: The distributor said contractors using the Richards Building Supply CRM can now access property data directly within the system to generate material quantities, prepare estimates and create purchase orders.

data.title: SPS Commerce announces new tools to address AI and supply chain volatility
data.description: Chief product officer Mike Svatek said the new offerings reflect how supply chains are adjusting as fulfillment paths multiply and planning cycles shorten.

data.title: Microsoft introduces agentic AI tools to automate retail and B2B commerce operations
data.description: Among the new offerings is Copilot Checkout, which allows customers to complete purchases directly inside Microsoft’s Copilot interface instead of being redirected to a retailer’s website.

data.title: LG Electronics continues focus on B2B, AI as core growth strategy
data.description: Priority investment areas include AI-enabled home technologies, smart factory solutions, AI data center cooling systems and robotics.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Walmart is using AI
data.description: Walmart's AI efforts cover not just deploying agents, but also building out AI systems that cater to shoppers, employees and partners.
